quotes: Background → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid background-color of Sunshine #faa31b as fallback
Headline → Brand Blue #00529b, centered, sitting in the top third, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px

Button → centered, in the lower-middle below the headline. Fill Deep Blue #003D74, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold #FFC20E arrow › (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.
Button radius (mandatory, never change): border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px; — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is always required on every instance
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
Headline → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px
Button → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`
`border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Maintain exact brand layout and signature button shape on the branded gradient CTA section.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA section must feature a centered headline and single button stacked horizontally over the branded gradient image (or solid Sunshine fallback #faa31b). The headline must be Brand Blue (#00529b) in Nunito Sans weight 800. The button must be sized 248 × 64px with a Deep Blue (#003D74) fill, a white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), a Gold (#FFC20E) 24px arrow (›) prepended by two non-breaking spaces, and the mandatory asymmetric border-radius (gradient_banner.button.radius = 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px).
rules.snippets: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯
